chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.108 of 2022 White Pearl Rice Mills Ltd. Versus Saif Bari Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 4226/22 2. For orders on CMA 4227/22 3. For orders on office objection/reply ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA 4228/22 5. For hearing of main case Dated: 17.10.2023 None present. -.-.- This matter is fixed for the second time and the counsel and representative of the appellant are called absent. Previously the matter was fixed on 22.12.2022 when position was same and there was no intimation either. Even today there is no intimation. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
